_comment: Write round-trip recipe for the k8s-e2e cluster smoke (scripts/k8s-e2e-smoke.sh). A valid CreditCard create body that satisfies the example's domain invariants (holderName.length > 0, last4.length == 4, expiryMonth in 1..12) — these live in the domain, NOT the OpenAPI request schema, so a synthesized body would 422. Loom's wire shape is identical across backends, so this single body is backend-agnostic.
